  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

Verwendungen von Package
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

Packages, die de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller
Contains the main execution controllers and initialization factories for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
Contains implementations of the Crossover operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
Contains implementations of the Mutation operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection
Contains implementations of the Selection operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io
Contains input/output operations for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service
Contains core application services for processing and mutating external data.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service.csv
Contains domain-specific CSV parser services.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    FitnessFunction
    Contract for evaluating the mathematical quality of a given candidate solution.
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Implements the main workflow of a genetic algorithm.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    GAProblem
    Interface representing a generic Genetic Algorithm Problem Domain.
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Implements the main workflow of a genetic algorithm.
    Population
    Represents a population of individuals in a genetic algorithm.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    Chromosome
    Represents a chromosome used in a genetic algorithm.
    FitnessFunction
    Contract for evaluating the mathematical quality of a given candidate solution.
    Individual
    Represents an individual in a genetic algorithm.
    Population
    Represents a population of individuals in a genetic algorithm.

    Beschreibung
    ChromosomePair
    A simple container holding two chromosomes.
